headline: Agentic AI at 97% underwriting accuracy. Digital sales from 20% to 70% at CBA.
evidence: Deployed agentic AI for underwriting at 97% accuracy (SCI). AI tools to 20% of technical users. Built AI governance framework. Digital sales from 20% to 70% at CBA. End-to-end digital underwriting with real-time pricing at SCI. Sophisticated workforce planning model forecasting attritional losses and catastrophe surges at CBA.
